summary: Verified scroll fixes applied to Marketplace, MintedPhotos, and PhotoGame pages. All three pages have proper CSS classes with touch-action: auto, overflow-y: scroll, and images with pointer-events: none. Backend selfie verification has MAX_ATTEMPTS=6 and MATCH_THRESHOLD=80 correctly configured.
critical_code_review_comments: MARKETPLACE: Line 250-254 has marketplace-scroll-container class with data-testid='marketplace-page'
MINTED PHOTOS: Line 1354-1358 has minted-photos-scroll-container class with data-testid='minted-photos-page'
PHOTO GAME: Line 2050-2054 has photo-game-scroll-container class with data-testid='photo-game-page'
CSS: Lines 1245-1350 in index.css define all three scroll container classes with identical bulletproof scroll fix pattern
BACKEND: Lines 1244-1247 in minting_routes.py have MAX_ATTEMPTS=6 (3 free + 3 paid) and MATCH_THRESHOLD=80
context_for_next_testing_agent: All scroll fixes verified working on mobile viewport (390x844). Marketplace, MintedPhotos, and PhotoGame pages all have proper CSS with touch-action: auto, overflow-y: scroll, and images with pointer-events: none. Backend selfie verification endpoint exists at /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/selfie-match with MAX_ATTEMPTS=6 and MATCH_THRESHOLD=80.
